nasb.text: It is better to live in a corner of a roof Than in a house shared with a contentious woman.

esv.text: It is better to live in a corner of the housetop than in a house shared with a quarrelsome wife.

cnv.text: 寧可住在房頂的一角， 也不跟吵鬧的婦人同住一間房屋。

ccb.text: 宁愿住在房顶的一角， 也不跟争闹之妻同屋。

csbs.text: 宁可住在屋顶的一角， 也好过与争吵的妻子同住一屋。
